# v6 modeling and AI sources

These sources support the mathematical and AI-engineering layer.

## Platform signal sources

- TikTok Help: How TikTok recommends content. User interactions include likes, shares, comments, full watches and skips; content information includes sounds, hashtags, views and publication context.
- YouTube Help: Shorts analytics and view-count update. Shorts metrics include shown in feed, chose-to-view, engaged views, average percentage viewed and search/traffic reports.
- Meta: Trial Reels. Trial Reels let creators test content with non-followers before sharing to followers.

## Experiment design sources

- NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: design of experiments, factors, response variables, randomisation and replication.
- Kohavi et al.: controlled experiments on the web; online experiments require attention to power, sample size, variance reduction, and practical limitations.
- Johari et al.: always-valid inference for sequentially monitored A/B tests.

## Optimisation and uncertainty sources

- Thompson sampling and multi-armed bandit literature: exploration/exploitation allocation under uncertain reward.
- Conformal prediction literature: model-agnostic prediction intervals with distribution-free coverage assumptions.
